headline: How The Evolving Investment Story Is Reshaping Apollo Tyres (NSEI:APOLLOTYRE)
summary: Apollo Tyres now carries a slightly lower fair value estimate, adjusted from about ₹539.74 to about ₹534.17 per share, a trim of roughly ₹5.57. This modest move aligns with wider Street commentary around Apollo linked names, where analysts have been revisiting valuation frameworks and risk assumptions rather than making wholesale calls on underlying businesses. As you read on, you will see how these fine tuning steps fit into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch as the story around...
